name: upscale_image
description: Upscale a low-resolution image to a higher resolution using AI-powered enhancement. The fast upscaler quickly increases image resolution while preserving and sharpening details. Ideal for improving small thumbnails, screenshots, or low-quality images. The request must be sent as multipart/form-data.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The image to upscale (multipart form upload). Supported formats: png, jpeg, webp. Maximum input resolution varies by plan.
